title: しあわせの青いバラのように

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: Oh, Rice! I didn't know you were already here.
Oh, Rice! I didn't know you were already here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Br—I mean, Trainer! H-hello.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Si—I mean, Trainer! H-hello.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A picture book. It's my favorite, "The Blue Rose of Good Fortune."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's set in a rose garden. A garden filled with roses of all kinds of
colors, which people loved to go and see.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But one day, a new rose buds in the garden, with a deep blue hue
that nobody has ever seen before.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
All the other flowers and visitors to the garden looked down on the
blue rose, calling it "creepy" or a "bad omen."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
After a while, the blue rose thinks to itself, "They're right. I'm a failure
of a flower," and starts to wilt.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, b-but, the story doesn't end there, okay? Because one day, Big
Brother appears before the drooping blue rose.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, b-but, the story doesn't end there, okay? Because one day, Big
Sister appears before the drooping blue rose.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's right—a really kind person with a gentle smile! And when this
new visitor saw the blue rosebud, they said...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"Why, this blue rose is simply magnificent! I can't wait to see it
blossom. Please let me purchase this rose!"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"Why, this blue rose is simply magnificent! I can't wait to see it
blossom. Please let me purchase this rose!"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
After that, Big Brother replanted the blue rose in a flowerpot, and he
talked to it every day until it bloomed into a lovely flower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
After that, Big Sister replanted the blue rose in a flowerpot, and she
talked to it every day until it bloomed into a lovely flower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The blue rose decorated his windowsill, where it brought good
fortune to anyone who would pass by.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The blue rose decorated her windowsill, where it brought good
fortune to anyone who would pass by.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Y-you think so too, Trainer?! Hehe, that makes me happy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I read this book for the first time when I was little. And it made me
think—maybe even I can become like the blue rose.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Instead of staying a useless girl of misfortune... I could grow into a
blue rose of good fortune.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Around the same time... Mother took me to go see a race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
There were so many people at the racecourse... I kept worrying about
how I didn't want to cause trouble for anyone, and it made my head
spin.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But you know, there's one thing I clearly remember! Everyone
watching the race had big smiles on their faces.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And when their favorite won the race... they all looked so happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's why I... I thought I'd love to be like that too someday.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
From a nuisance who brings misfortune upon others... to a runner who
can make everyone smile.
choice_data_list: If anyone can do it, it's you, Rice.
If anyone can do it, it's you, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yeah, you're right! I'm going to train my hardest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Since then, Rice has kept on training as hard as she can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And finally, the time has come!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you said you had big news?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: M-my debut!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So it's finally time for me to race...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, um!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'll be fine. I won't repeat what happened at the tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you're with me this time... So I'll give it my all! C'mon, Rice...
You can do this—yeah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... That's a little mantra that Mother taught me. She said it
would pump me up and get me motivated.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you want to try too?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-wait, me too! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We immediately return to training—this time with Rice's debut race in
mind. The preparations go swimmingly, and Rice's morale is at an
all-time high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Or so I thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The morning of the debut race...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are! Hey hey, you're Rice's trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All righty, to the Miho Dormitory we go!
choice_data_list: Wait a second, what's going on?!
Wait a second, what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Uh, you see, Rice has been playing hide-and-seek with everyone at
the dorm since this morning!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama, Bakushin O—everyone's out looking for her! It looked fun,
so I decided to play too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I peeked into one of the empty corner rooms, and Rice was actually in
there, but the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: She was mumbling, "Trainer..." in a real teensy voice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I thought maybe Rice wants her trainer to find her, and nobody
else.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go already! Just follow me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Urara! Didja find Rice—What the?! Why'd you bring her trainer
here?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you're planning on bringing them inside. You know that
trainers aren't allowed inside student dorms!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! My bad! But Rice wanted them to come...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Augh, fine! I'll let ya off this one time! Dorm mom is givin' ya permission, so scurry off, wouldja!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thanks a bunch, Hishiama! Trainer, over here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ummm. Knock knock knock, Riiice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-Urara... how did you know I was here?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well you see, you were calling for your trainer, so I brought them
here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer!
